UNDERTAKING SET IN THE AMOUNT OF $12,000, TO BE POSTED BEFORE FILING AMENDED COMPLAINT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

Ntc Of Mtn For Requiring Security Posting By Vexatious Litigant; Pos And Req.'S For Judicial Ntc
Off Calendar Apr-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ramsey F. Kawar, Esq., from Low, Ball & Lynch, 415-981-6630, for defendants and moving party
Martin Eng, 415-823-225, Plaintiff and opposing party in Pro Per

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT AARON SINEL's MOTION FOR REQUIRING SECURITY POSTING BY VEXATIOUS LITIGANT is Granted. Mr. Sinel has made a showing that Mr. Eng is a vexatious litigant and that there is not a reasonable probability that Mr. Eng will prevail in the litigation against Mr. Sinel.
Undertaking set in the amount of $12,000, to be posted before filing amended complaint. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: James J. McBride; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
